message:
feat(fwc,fcp-host): concurrent agent test expansion and module improvements

- Add lib.rs for benchmark/integration test re-exports
- Expand test coverage across 25+ modules (batch_file, computation_migration,
  confusion_workflow, e2e_playbooks, e2e_scenario, e2e_scripts, event_stream,
  extract, fleet_health, history_replay, host_harness, host_integration_*,
  lifecycle_install, lifecycle_mutations, op_replay, pipeline_defs, snapshot_*,
  template_render, test_observability, and more)
- Add cual_fixtures test harness and host_integration testdata
- Add fwc benchmarks infrastructure
- Add audit_chain, doctor module expansions
- Expand fcp-host test connector and integration test suite
- Add catalog.json testdata fixture

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -4598,6 +4598,7 @@ dependencies = [
  "chacha20poly1305",
  "chrono",
  "clap",
+ "criterion",
  "fcp-async-core",
  "fcp-cbor",
  "fcp-core",

@@ -11,6 +11,10 @@ authors.workspace = true
 [lints]
 workspace = true
 
+[lib]
+name = "fwc"
+path = "src/lib.rs"
+
 [[bin]]
 name = "fwc"
 path = "src/main.rs"
@@ -53,4 +57,9 @@ url.workspace = true
 uuid.workspace = true
 
 [dev-dependencies]
+criterion = { workspace = true }
 tempfile = "3"
+
+[[bench]]
+name = "cual_bench"
+harness = false

@@ -22,6 +22,7 @@
     { "path": "golden/mesh_rollout.toon", "kind": "golden_toon", "purpose": "Future mesh command TOON render snapshot.", "validation": "text" },
     { "path": "golden/setup_repair.json", "kind": "golden_json", "purpose": "Future setup command JSON repair snapshot.", "validation": "json" },
     { "path": "golden/setup_repair.toon", "kind": "golden_toon", "purpose": "Future setup command TOON repair snapshot.", "validation": "text" },
+    { "path": "host_integration/fixture_matrix.json", "kind": "host_integration_matrix", "purpose": "Typed matrix describing representative host-backed fixture coverage across connector archetypes.", "validation": "typed" },
     { "path": "introspection/github_introspection.json", "kind": "introspection", "purpose": "Rich GitHub introspection response with ten operations.", "validation": "typed" },
     { "path": "introspection/large_introspection.json", "kind": "introspection", "purpose": "High-cardinality introspection response with fifty operations.", "validation": "typed" },
     { "path": "introspection/minimal_introspection.json", "kind": "introspection", "purpose": "Minimal single-operation introspection response.", "validation": "typed" },

@@ -0,0 +1,139 @@
+{
+  "fixtures": [

+      "id": "github_issue_workflow",

+    {

+      ],

+    },
+    {
+      "id": "browser_session_automation",

+      "display_name": "Browser Automation",

+    {
